data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Netflix uses a cloud-based microservices architecture to ensure scalability and flexibility.
data.technical_spec: Deployed on AWS, each service is independently scalable and deployable.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: A global CDN ensures content is delivered quickly and efficiently to users worldwide.
data.technical_spec: Strategically placed edge servers cache and deliver content.

data.title: Data Pipeline
data.description: Robust data pipeline for real-time analytics and personalized recommendations.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes tools like Apache Kafka and Amazon Kinesis.

data.title: Playback Architecture
data.description: Resilient media player architecture for seamless content playback.
data.technical_spec: Adaptive bitrate streaming ensures smooth playback under varying network conditions.

data.title: Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Fully deployed on AWS, leveraging reliability and scalability of cloud services.
